description: Game art — first wave. Subject IDs match this domain's lane id_patterns (char_, env_, prop_, ship_) so `sdlab generate` will route each candidate into the correct lane instead of default_lane.

defaults.negative: photorealistic, photograph, 3d render, smooth CG, sharp photo detail

subjects.prompt: oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR CHARACTER — costume, faction identity, personal gear], painterly concept art, canvas grain
oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR ENVIRONMENT — town, dungeon, overworld location], painterly concept art, canvas grain
oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR PROP — quest item, treasure, story-carrying object], painterly concept art, canvas grain
oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR SHIP OR VEHICLE — exterior view, faction silhouette], painterly concept art, canvas grain
